daily.today_energy: The cosmos is giving you permission to soften your edges today, Libra. There's a gentle pull toward authenticity—your people need the real you, not the polished version.
daily.love: Someone's been noticing the small things you do. Whether it's romantic or platonic, reciprocate that energy. Your vibe is magnetic when you stop trying so hard.
daily.career: Your ideas hit different when you lead with conviction instead of consensus-seeking. Trust your instincts on that decision that's been lingering. You know more than you think.
daily.health: Your nervous system is asking for slowness today. A walk, tea, journaling—whatever makes you feel grounded. Listen to what your body's actually craving, not what you think it should be.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about reclaiming your space, Libra. The cosmos is nudging you toward authenticity over people-pleasing. Trust the subtle shifts happening behind the scenes—they're setting up something good.
weekly.love: Vulnerability is your superpower right now. Whether you're single or coupled up, showing your real self (messy parts included) creates real connections. Someone's noticing your energy shift.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. Don't sleep on that creative spark—jot it down, sketch it out, share it. Your unique perspective is exactly what's needed. The recognition might surprise you.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness over intensity. Think nourishing moves that feel good rather than punishing ones. Rest isn't laziness; it's you honoring what you actually need right now.
